description_long: This is a straight, rigid ladder with two parallel side rails and six evenly spaced horizontal rungs. The ladder appears to be constructed from a dark, metallic material, likely steel, giving it a robust and industrial look suitable for urban environments. The rungs are flat and rectangular, providing stable footing for climbing. The side rails are straight and rectangular in profile, with no visible bends or curves. There are no visible safety features such as anti-slip feet or handrails, indicating a basic utilitarian design. The overall finish is matte to slightly smooth, with a consistent dark coloration throughout.
description: A dark, metallic straight ladder with six flat rungs and rectangular side rails, featuring a robust, industrial design and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six evenly spaced rungs and the full length of the side rails.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin, flat profile of the ladder and the depth of the side rails.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the rungs and rails from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the depth of the rails.
